name: ChongQing Zhengchuan Pharmaceutical Packaging Co.,Ltd.
summary: ChongQing Zhengchuan Pharmaceutical Packaging Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, and selling of pharmaceutical glass packaging materials in China. It offers injection and oral liquid bottles; ampoules and medicinal glass tubes; and plastic flip off and aluminum caps. The company also offers various borosilicate glass bottles and soda lime glass tubes. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China.
